title: Retirement Everest Film Features HK Solutions on Decumulation Risks
summary: Retirement Everest film examines the challenges of managing finances after retirement, featuring Keith Helmendach of HK Solutions.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of financial planning beyond just saving for retirement, addressing the decumulation phase.

title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves 2 Dead, Several Wounded
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and multiple injuries, according to NC authorities.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and gun violence in community spaces, prompting investigations.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop in Charlotte
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Promotes advancements in polymer technology and provides training opportunities for industry professionals.

title: NAACP Warns Against Appointing Non-Black Interim Mayor in Charlotte
summary: NAACP Charlotte president Corine Mack urges city council to consider racial representation in interim mayor selection.
charlotte_impact: Highlights ongoing debates about diversity and inclusion in local government leadership.

title: Charlotte to Experience Sunny Weather, Temperatures Near 92 Degrees
summary: Charlotte is expected to have a sunny week with temperatures rising to near 92 degrees by Sunday.
charlotte_impact: Provides weather information relevant to residents planning outdoor activities.

title: Survey: High Costs Cause 1 in 3 Americans to Skip Summer Travel
summary: A survey reveals that many Americans are forgoing summer travel due to high flight and gas prices.
charlotte_impact: Reflects economic pressures affecting leisure activities and travel plans for many Americans.

title: CMS Board Approves Revised Budget Proposal After Debate
summary: The CMS Board approved a revised budget proposal to meet the state's deadline.
charlotte_impact: Ensures funding for Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools, impacting education programs and resources.

title: Fatal Tractor Trailer Collision on I-85 in Rowan County
summary: A tractor trailer collision on I-85 in Rowan County resulted in the driver's death and a hazardous material leak.
charlotte_impact: Disrupts traffic and raises environmental concerns due to the hazardous material spill.

title: Union County Foster Mom Urges Others to Open Homes Amid Growing Need
summary: A Union County foster mom highlights the increasing need for foster families during Foster Care Awareness Month.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the critical need for foster homes and encourages community involvement in supporting children.

title: Catawba County Elementary Teacher Arrested for Assaulting Student
summary: Christina McCarthy, a Catawba County elementary teacher, was arrested for assaulting a student.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about student safety and professional conduct in educational settings.

title: North Carolina Monitoring Hantavirus Exposure Linked to Cruise Ship
summary: North Carolina is monitoring potential hantavirus exposure linked to a cruise ship, with a high mortality rate.
charlotte_impact: Highlights public health concerns related to infectious diseases and travel.

title: CMPD Officers Cleared in Deadly Crime Spree Shooting
summary: Mecklenburg County DA clears CMPD officers in the shooting of a suspect involved in a deadly crime spree in Oct 2025.
charlotte_impact: Addresses issues of police accountability and the use of force in law enforcement.

title: Charlotte Rescinds Support for I-77 Toll Lane Project
summary: Charlotte city council votes to rescind support for the I-77 toll lane project and requests NCDOT to pause it.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing debates about transportation infrastructure and toll road projects.

title: South Carolina Leaders Consider Redrawing Congressional Districts
summary: South Carolina leaders are looking to redraw congressional districts ahead of midterm elections, potentially affecting minority votes.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about gerrymandering and its impact on fair representation in elections.

title: One Person Killed in Kannapolis Shooting
summary: A shooting outside a home on Woodlawn Street in Kannapolis resulted in one fatality.
charlotte_impact: Highlights ongoing issues of gun violence and public safety in the Kannapolis community.
